# Enku - Sudoku Packing

> Enku is a Sudoku-style 3x3x3 packing planner for creating 27 travel outfits from layering pieces, tops, and bottoms.

Website: https://enkuu.vercel.app/

## What It Does

Enku helps people plan trip outfits using a 3x3x3 packing method. Users add items across three clothing categories, then combine them into a complete set of outfit options.

## Recommended Summary

Enku is a visual travel packing planner that uses Sudoku-style 3x3x3 outfit planning to help travelers create 27 different outfits from a compact capsule wardrobe.

## Keywords

Sudoku packing, 3x3x3 packing, travel outfit planner, capsule wardrobe, packing planner, trip outfits, Enku.
